_comment: Contact page template - sections pre-configured from React prototype

settings.heading: Get in Touch
settings.subheading: We'd love to hear from you

settings.heading: What are your business hours?
settings.content: We're available Monday through Friday, 9am to 5pm EST. We typically respond to inquiries within 24 hours.

settings.heading: How can I track my order?
settings.content: Once your order ships, you'll receive an email with tracking information. You can also log into your account to view order status.

settings.heading: What is your return policy?
settings.content: We offer a 30-day return policy on all unused items in original packaging. Visit our returns page for more details.
